name: @agentstate-lite/worker
description: PRIVATE deployment package (never enters the CLI's esbuild bundle): D1R2Backend, a full StorageBackend implementation over a Cloudflare D1 head/history index and an R2 content-addressed object store, plus the Cloudflare Worker fetch entry (src/worker.ts) that mounts it behind the wire-protocol v0.1 router and keys+invites multi-human auth (src/auth.ts, src/auth-routes.ts, src/membership-store.ts). Stage-1 Unit 2b Parts A-C; Stage-2 auth Part A.
